title: Mega Charizard X Battle Guide
summary: A [Fire]/[Dragon] physical attacker with [tough-claws] — the ability boosts contact moves by 30%, and [flare-blitz] plus [dragon-claw] form a devastating dual STAB.
strengths: 130 Attack and 100 Speed for reliable offense
weaknesses: 78/111/85 bulk is decent but not exceptional
Pre-Mega turn runs [blaze] with the base stats

recommendedItems.reason: Mandatory Mega Stone with no alternative

bodyMarkdown:
## Overview
Mega Charizard X changes type from [Fire]/[Flying] to [Fire]/[Dragon] on Mega Evolution and gains [tough-claws], which boosts contact moves by 30%. The result is a [flare-blitz] / [dragon-claw] dual-STAB physical attacker with 130 Attack, 100 Speed, and respectable bulk.

## Strengths
[tough-claws] compounds with STAB: [flare-blitz] reaches an effective ~234 BP and [dragon-claw] reaches ~156 BP. The typing flip gives Mega Charizard X immunity to [Ground] falling away, but it gains [Grass] and [Bug] 4x resistances and [Electric]/[Water] weaknesses shifting profile. [earthquake] is a key coverage move that loses the [Flying] type immunity restriction.

## Weaknesses & Answers
After Mega Evolution, [Dragon], [Rock], and [Ground] become live weaknesses — [stone-edge] and [earthquake] users threaten KOs. The pre-Mega turn uses the base [Fire]/[Flying] typing and [blaze], which means the first turn can be a little awkward for planning.

## Recommended Moveset
[flare-blitz] is the hardest-hitting STAB. [dragon-claw] is the safe [Dragon] STAB for mirrors and [Dragon]-weak targets. [earthquake] handles [Rock]/[Steel]/[Electric] walls. [protect] is mandatory for the Mega turn and setup plays.

## Item · Ability · Tera
[charizardite-x] is mandatory. [tough-claws] activates after Mega. Tera [Fire] maxes [flare-blitz], Tera [Dragon] maxes [dragon-claw] and shifts the defensive profile.

## Teammates & Synergy
Cover [Dragon] and [Rock] with [Fairy] and [Water] partners. [intimidate] support extends bulk. [tailwind] support or slow pivots make Mega Charizard X harder to answer.

## Play Patterns
Protect on the Mega turn to absorb any pressure, then commit to [flare-blitz] or [dragon-claw] each turn based on match-up. Watch for [rock-slide] and [stone-edge] users, and save Tera for an emergency survival moment or a guaranteed finishing KO.
